# PageSeeder SDK v0.2.0

This release adds first-class PageSeeder search support, including fluent search request builders in `sdk-core` and search response decoding in `sdk-model`.

> This SDK is still under active redevelopment and is not ready for production use yet.

## Highlights

- Added the new `org.pageseeder.sdk.search` package in `sdk-core`.
- Added immutable builders for PageSeeder search service calls:
  - `QuestionSearch` for full-text question searches.
  - `FacetSearch` for facet extraction.
  - `PredicateSearch` for Lucene predicate searches.
- Added reusable search building blocks including `SearchScope`, `Facet`, `FacetList`, `Filter`, `Range`, `RangeFilter`, `Page`, `Question`, `Predicate`, `Criteria`, and `Fields`.
- Added support for group, project, project-group, and member-wide search scopes.
- Added sorting, pagination, question fields, facet selection, filters, ranges, and predicate/default-field options.
- Added service catalog constants for group, project, and member search endpoints.
- Added `org.pageseeder.sdk.model.search` in `sdk-model` for search results, hits, fields, facets, terms, suggestions, and decode options.
- Added `SearchResponseXmlDecoder` and `Decoders.search()` for typed XML decoding of PageSeeder search responses.
- Added unit coverage for search query serialization, escaping, range handling, facet behavior, sorting, service-call generation, and response decoding.
- Updated project endpoint templates to use `{project}` where the API path represents a project rather than a generic group.
- Updated published artifact IDs to include the `pageseeder-` prefix, for example `pageseeder-sdk-core`.
- Added Maven Central badge and SonarCloud quality gate badge updates.

## Compatibility Notes

- Requires Java 17.
- Artifact IDs changed from the plain module names used in `v0.1.0` to prefixed names:
  - `org.pageseeder.sdk:pageseeder-sdk-core`
  - `org.pageseeder.sdk:pageseeder-sdk-model`
  - `org.pageseeder.sdk:pageseeder-sdk-cli`
  - `org.pageseeder.sdk:pageseeder-sdk-legacy`
- Some project-related service endpoint path variables now use `project` instead of `group`; update affected `ServiceCall.pathVariable(...)` calls accordingly.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pageseeder/pageseeder-sdk/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
